rag_rules: Fix unresolved references to Brake_Mode and Brake_Cmd by ensuring they are declared in the same annex or properly imported.
Resolve type mismatches in binary expressions by aligning the types of left and right sides, ensuring consistent use of int, real, or bool.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the current scope and properly declared.
Use consistent scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE declarations and expressions to avoid type resolution errors.
Validate that all helper declarations and guarantees reference only visible features or previously declared helpers.
Place AGREE annexes in appropriate component type or implementation scopes based on the visibility of referenced elements.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for bindings and assignments.
Type declarations in AGREE must match AADL scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing identifiers that are not declared or visible in the current annex scope.
Do not mix incompatible types in binary expressions without explicit conversion.
